entity.summary: Sonic-native decentralized exchange using Liquidity Book dynamic liquidity market making and V2 automated market maker pools, with token swaps, liquidity pools, farms, and non-custodial maker vaults.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies Metropolis as a Sonic-native Liquidity Book DLMM decentralized exchange with V2 pools, concentrated liquidity, swaps, farms, and maker vaults. It links a live DEX application and publishes Sonic mainnet factories, routers, quoters, and pair implementation addresses. No exact launch date, legal jurisdiction, legal entity, predecessor, successor, or terminal lifecycle fact is asserted.

evidence.title: Metropolis DEX overview
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes Metropolis as a Sonic-native Liquidity Book DLMM decentralized exchange powered by concentrated-liquidity and V2 AMM pools, and links the current DEX application.

evidence.title: Metropolis Sonic mainnet smart contracts
evidence.notes: First-party contract registry publishes current Sonic mainnet V2 and Liquidity Book factories, routers, quoter, and pair implementation addresses, supporting active protocol status.
